description: The On Grip End node takes in a global reference of a LocomotionGrip, and fires an event when the grip has been released, as well as information of the locomotion module and the body node that was gripping.

fields.OnEvent: Fires when the grip is released by the user.
fields.Module: Returns the module that was gripping.
fields.GrippingBodyNode: Returns the body node that was gripping.
